chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.S-160 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on M.A. 549/2025 2. For orders on office objections. 3. For orders on M.A. 550/2025 4. For hearing of main case. 23.04.2025 Ms. Tahrim Jawahery advocate for Petitioners along with petitioners. -.-.-. 1. Granted. 2. Deferred for the time being. 3. Granted subject to all just exceptions. 4. Petitioners’ Counsel states that Petitioner No.1 and Petitioner No.2 have contracted freewill marriage of their own freewill as they both are major and sui juris. Counsel has filed the nikahnama as Annexure A and their freewill affidavit as Annexure B in support of her arguments. She further prays that they fear harassment at the hands of private Respondents who are stated to be relatives of Petitioner No.1, therefore, they may be provided protection so that they could reach their home village safely and can live their life freely and happily. In such circumstances, Respondents No.2 Senior Superintendent of Police Sanghar as well as Respondents No.4 & 5 SHO PS Jhol and SHO PS Sinjhoro are strictly directed to provide protection to life and liberty of Petitioner’s as envisaged in the Constitution of Pakistan 1973. Matter in above terms stand disposed off. J U D G E Ali Haider
